answer: We have five exciting new additions to the menu right now! [1] The Toro Truffle Roll features fatty tuna with shaved black truffle and gold leaf, [3] the Chef's Omakase is a twelve-piece chef-selected course, [4] the Sashimi Moriawase showcases seven cuts of the morning's freshest fish, [5] the Ikura Don is a beautiful salmon roe rice bowl, and [6] the Couple's Set is a twenty-piece spread perfect for two. Take your pick!

recommendations.name: Toro Truffle Roll
recommendations.why: Flagged as one of our newest items, this luxurious roll combines fatty tuna, shaved black truffle, micro shiso, and gold leaf [1].

recommendations.name: Chef’s Omakase
recommendations.why: A newest addition, this twelve-piece chef-selected omakase is chosen fresh each morning and delivered cold-chain [3].

recommendations.name: Sashimi Moriawase
recommendations.why: One of our newest dishes, the Sashimi Moriawase offers seven cuts of the morning's best fish including hamachi, uni, and kanpachi [4].

recommendations.name: Ikura Don
recommendations.why: A newest arrival, the Ikura Don features salmon roe cured in soy and sake served over warm vinegared rice [5].

recommendations.name: Couple’s Set
recommendations.why: Also brand new, the Couple's Set delivers twenty pieces balanced across nigiri, maki, and sashimi — ideal for sharing [6].
